---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# adiabatic_evolution

## Definite the H

```{julia}
include("./04_workflow/adiabatic_evolution/op_creator.jl")
```

```{julia}
# H
qubit_num = 8
p = (T = 1,)
H = create_ssh_H(qubit_num, p);
```

```{julia}
# magnet quantity
Mz = create_magnet_quantity(qubit_num);
```

## spectrum

```{julia}
include("./04_workflow/adiabatic_evolution/op_spectrum.jl")
dt = 0.01
tlist = range(0, p.T; step = dt)
Es, eigenvalues = get_spectrum(H, p, tlist; energy_num=20);
```

## evolution

```{julia}
ψ0 = basic_states[1];
dt = 0.01
tlist = range(0, p.T; step = dt)

sol = sesolve(H, ψ0, tlist; params = p, e_ops = [Mz], saveat = tlist,);
```

```{julia}
eigenstates[1] == sol.states[1]
norm(dot(eigenstates[1], sol.states[1]))
```
